> it's blur
Q&AProjects Contact


YouTubeGitHubTumblrDiscordBlueSkyitch.io

This site serves as a portal for information about my public endeavors, such as coding projects, videos, streams, and status updates. At the right of the navigation bar you will find links to my YouTube ,Tumblr , and my Github. Under Projects, you will find information on some projects I liked enough to document, mainly bots. Under Transparency, you will find information on all money earned directly or indirectly through the platforms noted here, as well as money spent directly on the channels. (more information is available on the page).


Friends of the Me

Here are a few other sites you might like. Friends, collaborators, and just some cool sites to check out.
Kinda want to get a webring going here.

Vincent's Website(https://www.vincent-lee.net/)
Friend, Developer, and Musician. You may know him as williewillus. I like this guy.
Ellpeck.de(https://ellpeck.de/)
Long-time friend, Game Developer, and former Minecraft Modder. Also quite flexible!
The End Zone(https://theendercore.com/)
Ender is a friend and frequent collaborator who won't stop fixing my mods.
Jasmine's Website(https://jaskarth.com/)
Jasmine is a software engineer with a knack for compiler design, among other things.
Una's Y2k Site(https://y2k.my/)
A site by Una with a variety of little tchotchkies and such, themed after personal sites of old.
Una's not-Y2k Site(https://unascribed.com)
Una's main site. She's a friend and developer on a variety of mainly Minecraft-related projects.
Asie's site(https://asie.pl)
Also known as, uh, cbrzeszczot. Talented dev shrouded in mystery. And big hat.
Kat!(https://kat.blue)
It's Kat's site! :3
